title: Vistra Looks Forward With Proposed Nuclear Acquisition
text: Vistra is a $9.1 billion market cap independent power producer generating and selling electricity in Texas and other areas of the country. Although over half of its generation is natural-gas fueled, it has announced a strategic acquisition of more nuclear power plants, which meets twin goals of baseload reliability and zero-carbon sourcing.

title: 3 Utility Stocks to Add to Your Portfolio as Volatility Grips Markets
text: Fresh fears over the stability of the U.S. financial sector gripped markets following the collapse of First Republic Bank. It would thus be prudent to invest in defensive stocks like NJR, NI & VST.
